_note: Real per-season data, 1994-2025. Primary source: mgoblue.com official cumulative season statistics (per-player, offense AND defense, 1997+), pulled via scripts/fetch-football-mgoblue.mjs. 1994-1996 offense from Sports-Reference season pages (complete tables); pre-1997 per-player defense (tackles/TFL/sacks) is not published by any citable source, so those seasons carry INT-only lines where SR has them (a documented data floor - see docs/DATA-SOURCING.md). A handful of mgoblue rows that mislink a stat line to the wrong player (verified against SR) were reassigned or repaired with SR cited as that row's source. QB rushYds is the NCAA net (sacks count against rushing), so it can be negative. redshirtYears marks tenure years with no ratable season row (redshirt, injury, or a position-switch year with no line at the listed position). honors[] is per-season, derived award-first from Wikipedia's per-year All-Big Ten / All-America team articles plus the Big Ten individual-award and Silver Football pages, then verified by a programmatic wikitext re-derivation pass (13 agent omissions caught and fixed; zero fabrications found). A handful of mgoblue-omitted seasons (e.g. Peppers 2015, Charbonnet 2019) plus two mgoblue-omitted QBs (Sheridan, O'Korn) were filled from SR, cited per row.
